intro: Government and technology sectors were the primary focus of recent cybersecurity advisories from CISA, which published nine alerts between April 12 and April 25, 2026. The alerts addressed three critical and six high-severity vulnerabilities, including CVE-2024-57726 (CVSS 9.9), CVE-2026-34197 (CVSS 8.8), CVE-2024-20662, and CVE-2024-21412. These vulnerabilities primarily affected organizations in the United States and globally, with software development also among the impacted sectors.
